cards.title: Fix DI_03 — normalize kiosk counts per 10K seats
cards.notes: Count normalization needed — absolute counts not comparable across 32 clubs.

cards.title: Fix DI_05 — move 'not measured' to non-response option
cards.notes: 'We have not measured X' must be a non-response (score 0), not option A.

cards.title: Fix TS_01 — add concessionaire handling guidance
cards.notes: Clubs may not control POS/F&B — question must account for concessionaire-managed scenarios.

cards.title: Finalize question selection — V0 vs V1 vs merged
cards.notes: Team decision needed with Vik + Kieran. Compare Claude V0 (51q) vs colleague V1 (50q) vs merged.

cards.title: Platform decision — Tableau Cloud vs Power BI
cards.notes: Jordan reporting back ~Mar 30. Blocks all dashboard spec work.

cards.title: One survey link vs persona-split survey
cards.notes: Discuss with Vik + Jon Noble on Monday call.

cards.title: Review all 51 V0 questions in Question Review tool
cards.notes: Use Focus mode with Kieran. Flag issues, add comments, save to Excel.

cards.title: Run /scoring-design — build methodology from question set
cards.notes: Critical path. Blocks dashboard spec, reports, and pilot deployment. Run after questions are locked.

cards.title: Confirm scoring methodology with Jon Wakefield
Run /dashboard-spec — design Tableau/Power BI views
cards.notes: Blocked on: scoring methodology + platform decision.

cards.title: Deploy survey to 4-club pilot
cards.notes: Clubs: Cardinals, Broncos, TBD (Bears or Bucs). Blocked on locked questions + scoring.

cards.title: Phase 2 summary deck
cards.notes: Client-facing summary of methodology and initial findings.
